school_address.streetAddress: Cd international school, Sector 71, Gurugram, Haryana 122001, India

reviews.author: Brijulal Kithu
reviews.review_body: Was here for Civils prelims examination, very disappointed with the approach of the Institute admin and the District authorities about the arrangements made for the examination. Despite being an international school in tag, they failed to provide Cloak Room for keeping the belongings of the candidates who came from long distances, we were forced to keep backpacks and valuable belongings in it, outside the building, open to the sky, which got dirty by some dirty water flooded in the place during the afternoon paper. There were no arrangements for the candidate to sit or wait anywhere, all were forced to sit on the side of the outside road. Esp when the exam is from Morning to evening, these arrangements are well required, which were not fulfilled. Complete failure from the side of School and district admns. And another joke is, the school's washroom has no water pipe or wash basin inside the common toilets! While there was a fountain beside the entrance of the building.

reviews.author: Preeti Dalal
reviews.review_body:
Great school..
CDIS school teach value lessons, communication and leadership skills. Teachers are well qualified and helpful in nature. Positive environment for learning. Excellent management .

reviews.author: Himani Vashist
reviews.review_body: The School has a very Holistic Teaching methodology and the Staff make special efforts to make every Child feel special and loved. School is excellent in academics . The teachers and staff works very hard to ensure well being of all their students.

reviews.author: sanjana dixit
reviews.review_body: This school has one of the best environment for students accompanied by a lush green surrounding. The teachers are helpful and are always there to help out and look after every child. It is a great place for children to develop social skills, confidence and independence. Teachers have good relationships and a doing an excellent job motivating their students. Students feel happy, safe and are provided a stimulating learning environment. Teachers use all the advanced digital learning practices to sharpen kid’s intellect.

reviews.author: Pankaj Singh
reviews.review_body: I have visited this school for online examination. Management is very poor. Seems like they are conducting small kids examination. It is located at very remote location, otherwise school is good. Parking facility is also good.
